items.summary:
roborock’s direct website is currently offering the advanced Saros Z70 Robot Vacuum and Mop with an OmniGrip mechanical arm at $1,299.99 shipped, which also happens to be matching in price at Amazon. This first-of-its-kind robot cleaner normally goes for $2,599 at full price, which has been frequently kept down at $2,000 since September at Amazon. Following a recurring trend since Black Friday, this deal marks the fourth discount in the time since that it has received a $1,299 markdown to the all-time lowest price we have tracked. If you want an even newer model that only just hit the market (while not touting the mechanical arm at a much lower price), you can currently find the latest Qrevo Curv 2 Flow Robot Vacuum and Mop with a self-cleaning roller mop down at its second-lowest price of $899.99 shipped, matching in price at Amazon.

items.title: Heybike’s newest-gen Mars 3.0 folding fat-tire e-bike gets a FREE pannier bag at its second-lowest $1,299 rate (Reg. $1,799)
items.summary:
As part of the ongoing Women’s Day Sale, which now includes open purchases for the newly launched Venus Lightweight Cruiser e-bike (sadly without price cuts), Heybike is offering the third-ever discount on its Mars 3.0 Folding Fat-Tire e-bike with a FREE pannier bag at $1,299 shipped. Fetching $1,799 at full price (and $1,878 with the pannier bag’s value factored in), this particular model launched alongside the Ranger 3.0 e-bike that is also seeing a discount during this event back in August, with both models receiving their third-ever savings here. Previously, both the launch deal and Black Friday sale took the costs down to the $1,199 low, but you’re getting the next-best price here with $500 savings off its going rate ($579 total savings with the bag). During this event, you can also save more by going with the less advanced Mars 2.0 Folding e-bike at its $899 low, or the upgraded Mars 2.0 e-bike at its $999 low.

more…
